description:
What: In build_fn_signature (ir_codegen.rs:896), when a fn's any-key spec has a result Descr that pins to exactly one HeapKind, set return_reprs[sid] = ArgRepr::Dst(k). Reuses the existing return-type join over Return sites.

Invariant: never emitted on extern signatures (asserted).

Why: Single decision point. Everything downstream reads return_reprs.

CLIF impact: unchanged (no lowering consumes Dst yet — C2 turns it on).

Tests: golden assertion that selected stdlib fns get Dst ABI in their any-key spec; externs never do.
title: fz-dps.C1: per-spec result Descr -> HeapKind classifier
